review_findings.finding: Stage 9 had no whole-stage review gate or evidence after Phase 9.1/9.2/9.3 reached guardrail, delivery freeze, and user confirmation state.
review_findings.fix: Added STAGE9_WHOLE_STAGE_REVIEW.md, whole_stage_review evidence pack, terminal log, changed files, risk/rollback, and contract test.
review_findings.verification: test_v024_stage9_whole_review_contract.py covers artifacts, bounded scope, phase consistency, stop conditions, findings, and non-upload gate.

review_findings.finding: Top-level status files still described Stage 9 Phase 9.3 as waiting after the user replied 1.
review_findings.fix: Updated README, HANDOFF, RUN_CONTRACT, STAGE9_REGRESSION_FREEZE, CHANGELOG, and three baseline status files to record whole-stage review pass and next GitHub upload gate.
review_findings.verification: Stage 9 whole review contract checks status files for whole-stage review pass while keeping GitHub upload and future version work unstarted.

review_findings.finding: Stage 9 lacked one consolidated command/evidence surface tying regression guardrails, delivery freeze index, user confirmation, no fake data, no upload, and no future-version boundary together before upload.
review_findings.fix: Added whole_stage_review/evidence.json with reviewed phase IDs, phase statuses, validation surface, stop-condition audit, commands, remaining gates and explicit non-goals.
review_findings.verification: Whole-review pytest, Stage 9 phase regressions, Stage 8 upload boundary, py_compile, json evidence checks, changed-files reconciliation and git diff check are recorded as pass.
